data.title: Recall.ai secures $38M in Series B funding, reaching $250M valuation; expanding conversation data solutions.
data.description: Recall.ai, a San Francisco-based company known for its API for meeting recordings, has recently secured $38 million in Series B funding. This funding round has valued the company at $250 million. Bessemer Venture Partners led the funding, with investments also coming in from HubSpot Ventures and Salesforce Ventures. The company plans to use this capital injection to diversify its offerings, moving beyond meeting integrations and introducing new features such as the Desktop Recording SDK, dialers, phone, and in-person conversation data capture capabilities.

data.title: Agentic automation highlighted at ABBYY Ascend Fall event in Austin on October 14, 2025.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, ABBYY Ascend Fall on October 14, 2025, is set to showcase the latest advancements in agentic automation. This event will highlight the future of automation, with a focus on empowering businesses through innovative technology.

data.title: G-III Apparel Group, Ltd. reported second quarter fiscal 2026 results on Sept. 4, 2025, ending July 31, 2025.
data.description: In New York on September 4, 2025, G-III Apparel Group, Ltd. (NasdaqGS: GIII) disclosed their financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, concluding on July 31, 2025.

data.title: "EmPOWER AI 2025 conference in Napa unites 40 global companies to discuss AI's impact on energy sector."
data.description: A conference called EmPOWER AI presented by Bidgely is scheduled to take place from September 16-18 in Napa, California. Over 40 global companies will be represented at this event, which serves as a platform for dialogue among utility leaders, data experts, and AI executives regarding the transformative impact of AI in the energy sector. The conference aims to showcase the latest AI advancements, building on the success of last year's debut where Bidgely introduced groundbreaking innovations.

data.title: Talitha Koum partners with Frieze Connect to spotlight artist June Lee in Seoul during Frieze Seoul event.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, Talitha Koum, a high-end vegan skincare company, collaborated with Frieze Connect to showcase the work of Korean contemporary artist June Lee at an Artist Reception in the Talitha Koum flagship store. The event coincided with Frieze Seoul, the Asian leg of the prestigious global art fair, Frieze. June Lee's renowned Bystander series was highlighted during the event, which included discussions with Moon Sun Chai, the CEO and creator of Talitha Koum.
